success_criteria: Codex instruction consumer validates and records this instruction without bypassing safety gates.

parameters.summary: Peer review validated: TV full-season gate + monitor architecture is sound and enforces complete seasons only. Continue natural retry for missing episodes (Haunted Hotel 2, MobLand 1, The Institute 1). No bounded alternate-source lane or partial publication approved.
